topic: Energy is not only about stimulation
continuity_tokens: same Japanese professional in early 30s across shots 01 to 03
same pale oak, cloud white, mist blue palette
visual_intent: clean close framing for editorial text overlay later
brand_guardrails: avoid turning the shot into a generic tabletop stock photo
avoid caffeine, energy-drink, or supplement-first storytelling
keep the action clear and singular
the scene must fill the entire 4:5 canvas with no blank bars or inset composition
composition: one action such as setting down a phone beside water and notebook
clean negative space around the action
real environment at every edge of the frame
reference_strategy: Use the Set 4 lifestyle working example to keep the routine world believable, while the whitespace and cool-palette anchors keep the shot airy and premium.
variation_guardrails: do not let the shot become cluttered breakfast content
keep the action more reflective than productive
reject and regenerate if the composition feels like a square crop inside a tall canvas
reject and regenerate if the shot reads as a generic supplement lifestyle ad
notes: April 1 reel shot 02. The action should quietly shift the idea from drive and momentum toward daily foundation and self-regulation.
